revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=乃伎多神社| 所在地=滋賀県[[伊香郡]]高月町東阿閉1094| 祭神=誉田別命
天造日女命| 社格=式内社
村社| 創建=創祀年代不詳| 例祭=[[9月13日]]| 神事=もろこ祭}} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は[[滋賀県]][[伊香郡]][[高月町]]東阿閉にある[[神社]]である。 ==ご祭神== * [[誉田別命]] * [[天造日女命]] ==ご神紋== :左三ッ巴 ==歴史== :創祀年代不詳。[[延喜式神名帳]]に記載されている[[式内社]]論社である。[[浅井氏]]の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、[[賤ヶ岳の合戦]]の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は[[寛政]]9年の造営。[[明治]]9年に村社に列格した。 ==祭事== * オコナイ　　　　2月 8日 * 例祭（もろこ祭）9月13日 ==境内社== * 神明社 == 関連項目 == *[[神道]] *[[神社]] {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:高月町]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:村社]] {{Shinto-stub}}

revision.comment: 緯度経度の追加
revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=乃伎多神社| 所在地=滋賀県[[伊香郡]]高月町東阿閉1094| 位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|28|N|136|13|04|E|}}| 祭神=誉田別命
天造日女命| 社格=式内社
村社| 創建=創祀年代不詳| 例祭=[[9月13日]]| 神事=もろこ祭}} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は[[滋賀県]][[伊香郡]][[高月町]]東阿閉にある[[神社]]である。 ==ご祭神== * [[誉田別命]] * [[天造日女命]] ==ご神紋== :左三ッ巴 ==歴史== :創祀年代不詳。[[延喜式神名帳]]に記載されている[[式内社]]論社である。[[浅井氏]]の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、[[賤ヶ岳の合戦]]の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は[[寛政]]9年の造営。[[明治]]9年に村社に列格した。 ==祭事== * オコナイ　　　　2月 8日 * 例祭（もろこ祭）9月13日 ==境内社== * 神明社 == 関連項目 == *[[神道]] *[[神社]] {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:高月町]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:村社]] {{Shinto-stub}}

revision.comment: やや改。ついでに改名提案
revision.text:
{{改名提案|[[乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]]|date=2010年2月}} {{神社 |名称 = 乃伎多神社 |画像 = |所在地 = 滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|scale:25000}} |祭神 = 誉田別命
天造日女命 |社格 = 式内社論社・旧村社 |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = [[流造|一間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[9月13日]]（もろこ祭） |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日） }} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]][[高月町]]東阿閉にある[[神社]]である。 ==祭神== * [[誉田別命]] * [[天造日女命]] ==神紋== 左三ッ巴 ==歴史== 創祀年代不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載されている[[近江国]][[伊香郡]]「乃伎多神社」の論社である（[[式内社論社]]）他の論社に同市同町東物部鎮座の[[乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東物部)|同名神社]]がある。。[[浅井氏]]の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、[[賤ヶ岳の合戦]]の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は[[寛政]]9年（[[1797年]]）の造営。[[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）に[[村社]]に列格した。 ==祭事== * 例祭（もろこ祭） - 9月13日 * [[オコナイ]] - 2月8日 ==境内社== * 神明社 == 脚注 == {{reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:村社]] [[Category:長浜市]] {{Shinto-stub}}

{{神社 |名称 = 乃伎多神社 |画像 = |所在地 = 滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|scale:25000}} |祭神 = 誉田別命
天造日女命 |社格 = 式内社論社・旧村社 |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = [[流造|一間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[9月13日]]（もろこ祭） |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日） }} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]高月町東阿閉にある[[神社]]である。 ==祭神== * [[誉田別命]] * [[天造日女命]] ==神紋== 左三ッ巴 ==歴史== 創祀年代不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載されている[[近江国]][[伊香郡]]「乃伎多神社」の論社である（[[式内社論社]]）他の論社に同市同町東物部鎮座の[[乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東物部)|同名神社]]がある。。[[浅井氏]]の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、[[賤ヶ岳の戦い]]の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は[[1797年]]（[[寛政]]9年）の造営。[[1876年]]（[[明治]]9年）に[[村社]]に列格した。 ==祭事== * 例祭（もろこ祭） - 9月13日 * [[オコナイ]] - 2月8日 ==境内社== * 神明社 == 脚注 == {{reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:長浜市の神社]]

{{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 乃伎多神社 |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]高月町東阿閉1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[誉田別命]]
天造日女命 |社格 = [[式内社]]論社・旧[[村社]] |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = [[流造|一間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[9月13日]]（もろこ祭） |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=乃伎多神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]高月町東阿閉にある[[神社]]である。 == 祭神 == * [[誉田別命]] * [[天造日女命]] == 神紋 == 左三ッ巴 == 歴史 == 創祀年代不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載されている[[近江国]][[伊香郡]]「乃伎多神社」の論社である（[[式内社論社]]）他の論社に同市同町東物部鎮座の[[乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東物部)|同名神社]]がある。。[[浅井氏]]の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、[[賤ヶ岳の戦い]]の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は[[1797年]]（[[寛政]]9年）の造営。[[1876年]]（[[明治]]9年）に[[村社]]に列格した。 == 祭事 == * 例祭（もろこ祭） - 9月13日 * [[オコナイ]] - 2月8日 == 境内社 == * 神明社 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

{{nihongo|'''Nogita Shrine'''|乃伎多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Nogita Shrine'''|乃伎多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nogita Shrine'''|乃伎多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Nogita Shrine'''|乃伎多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nogita Shrine'''|乃伎多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nogita Shrine'''|乃伎多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Nogita Shrine'''|乃伎多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Nogita Shrine'''|乃伎多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{Expand Japanese|乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)}}

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Nogita Shrine'''|乃伎多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nogita Shrine'''|乃伎多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nogita Shrine'''|乃伎多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nogita Shrine'''|乃伎多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

天造日女命 |社格 = [[式内社]]論社・旧[[村社]] |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = [[流造|一間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[9月13日]]（もろこ祭） |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=乃伎多神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]高月町東阿閉にある[[神社]]である。 == 祭神 == * [[誉田別命]] * [[天造日女命]] == 神紋 == 左三ッ巴 == 歴史 == 創祀年代不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載されている[[近江国]][[伊香郡]]「乃伎多神社」の論社である（[[式内社論社]]）他の論社に同市同町東物部鎮座の[[乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東物部)|同名神社]]がある。。[[浅井氏]]の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、[[賤ヶ岳の戦い]]の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は[[1797年]]（[[寛政]]9年）の造営。[[1876年]]（[[明治]]9年）に[[村社]]に列格した。 == 祭事 == * 例祭（もろこ祭） - 9月13日 * [[オコナイ]] - 2月8日 == 境内社 == * 神明社 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

天造日女命 |社格 = [[式内社]]論社・旧[[村社]] |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = [[流造|一間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[9月13日]]（もろこ祭） |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=乃伎多神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]高月町東阿閉にある[[神社]]である。 == 祭神 == * [[誉田別命]] * [[天造日女命]] == 神紋 == 左三ッ巴 == 歴史 == 創祀年代不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載されている[[近江国]][[伊香郡]]「乃伎多神社」の論社である（[[式内社論社]]）他の論社に同市同町東物部鎮座の[[乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東物部)|同名神社]]がある。。[[浅井氏]]の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、[[賤ヶ岳の戦い]]の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は[[1797年]]（[[寛政]]9年）の造営。[[1876年]]（[[明治]]9年）に[[村社]]に列格した。 == 祭事 == * 例祭（もろこ祭） - 9月13日 * [[オコナイ]] - 2月8日 == 境内社 == * 神明社 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

{{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 乃伎多神社 |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高月町東阿閉1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|誉田別命}}
天造日女命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|9月13日|Q2848}}（もろこ祭） |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=乃伎多神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高月町東阿閉にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|誉田別命}} * {{jalink|天造日女命}} === 神紋 === 左三ッ巴 === 歴史 === 創祀年代不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載されている{{jalink|近江国|Q843882}}{{jalink|伊香郡|Q1042353}}「乃伎多神社」の論社である（{{jalink|式内社論社}}）他の論社に同市同町東物部鎮座の{{jalink|乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東物部)||同名神社}}がある。。{{jalink|浅井氏|Q1872031}}の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、{{jalink|賤ヶ岳の戦い|Q225562}}の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は{{jalink|1797年|Q7820}}（{{jalink|寛政|Q1195131}}9年）の造営。{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列格した。 === 祭事 === * 例祭（もろこ祭） - 9月13日 * {{jalink|オコナイ|Q11291908}} - 2月8日 === 境内社 === * 神明社 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

天造日女命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|9月13日|Q2848}}（もろこ祭） |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=乃伎多神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高月町東阿閉にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|誉田別命}} * {{jalink|天造日女命}} === 神紋 === 左三ッ巴 === 歴史 === 創祀年代不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載されている{{jalink|近江国|Q843882}}{{jalink|伊香郡|Q1042353}}「乃伎多神社」の論社である（{{jalink|式内社論社}}）他の論社に同市同町東物部鎮座の{{jalink|乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東物部)||同名神社}}がある。。{{jalink|浅井氏|Q1872031}}の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、{{jalink|賤ヶ岳の戦い|Q225562}}の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は{{jalink|1797年|Q7820}}（{{jalink|寛政|Q1195131}}9年）の造営。{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列格した。 === 祭事 === * 例祭（もろこ祭） - 9月13日 * {{jalink|オコナイ|Q11291908}} - 2月8日 === 境内社 === * 神明社 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005004576 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Nokitano Shrine|lt=Nokitano Shrine|WD=Q135039854}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 乃伎多神社 |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高月町東阿閉1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|誉田別命}}
天造日女命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|9月13日|Q2848}}（もろこ祭） |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=乃伎多神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高月町東阿閉にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|誉田別命}} * {{jalink|天造日女命}} === 神紋 === 左三ッ巴 === 歴史 === 創祀年代不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載されている{{jalink|近江国|Q843882}}{{jalink|伊香郡|Q1042353}}「乃伎多神社」の論社である（{{jalink|式内社論社}}）他の論社に同市同町東物部鎮座の{{jalink|乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東物部)||同名神社}}がある。。{{jalink|浅井氏|Q1872031}}の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、{{jalink|賤ヶ岳の戦い|Q225562}}の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は{{jalink|1797年|Q7820}}（{{jalink|寛政|Q1195131}}9年）の造営。{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列格した。 === 祭事 === * 例祭（もろこ祭） - 9月13日 * {{jalink|オコナイ|Q11291908}} - 2月8日 === 境内社 === * 神明社 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 乃伎多神社 |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高月町東阿閉1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|誉田別命}}
天造日女命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|9月13日|Q2848}}（もろこ祭） |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=乃伎多神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高月町東阿閉にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|誉田別命}} * {{jalink|天造日女命}} === 神紋 === 左三ッ巴 === 歴史 === 創祀年代不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載されている{{jalink|近江国|Q843882}}{{jalink|伊香郡|Q1042353}}「乃伎多神社」の論社である（{{jalink|式内社論社}}）他の論社に同市同町東物部鎮座の{{jalink|乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東物部)||同名神社}}がある。。{{jalink|浅井氏|Q1872031}}の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、{{jalink|賤ヶ岳の戦い|Q225562}}の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は{{jalink|1797年|Q7820}}（{{jalink|寛政|Q1195131}}9年）の造営。{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列格した。 === 祭事 === * 例祭（もろこ祭） - 9月13日 * {{jalink|オコナイ|Q11291908}} - 2月8日 === 境内社 === * 神明社 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 乃伎多神社 |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高月町東阿閉1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|誉田別命}}
天造日女命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|9月13日|Q2848}}（もろこ祭） |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=乃伎多神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高月町東阿閉にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|誉田別命}} * {{jalink|天造日女命}} === 神紋 === 左三ッ巴 === 歴史 === 創祀年代不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載されている{{jalink|近江国|Q843882}}{{jalink|伊香郡|Q1042353}}「乃伎多神社」の論社である（{{jalink|式内社論社}}）他の論社に同市同町東物部鎮座の{{jalink|乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東物部)||同名神社}}がある。。{{jalink|浅井氏|Q1872031}}の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、{{jalink|賤ヶ岳の戦い|Q225562}}の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は{{jalink|1797年|Q7820}}（{{jalink|寛政|Q1195131}}9年）の造営。{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列格した。 === 祭事 === * 例祭（もろこ祭） - 9月13日 * {{jalink|オコナイ|Q11291908}} - 2月8日 === 境内社 === * 神明社 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 乃伎多神社 |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高月町東阿閉1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|誉田別命}}
天造日女命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|9月13日|Q2848}}（もろこ祭） |神事 = オコナイ（2月8日） |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=乃伎多神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''乃伎多神社'''（のぎたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高月町東阿閉にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|誉田別命}} * {{jalink|天造日女命}} === 神紋 === 左三ッ巴 === 歴史 === 創祀年代不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載されている{{jalink|近江国|Q843882}}{{jalink|伊香郡|Q1042353}}「乃伎多神社」の論社である（{{jalink|式内社論社}}）他の論社に同市同町東物部鎮座の{{jalink|乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東物部)||同名神社}}がある。。{{jalink|浅井氏|Q1872031}}の家臣阿閉淡路守の庇護を受けていたが、{{jalink|賤ヶ岳の戦い|Q225562}}の際兵火に失した。現在の社殿は{{jalink|1797年|Q7820}}（{{jalink|寛政|Q1195131}}9年）の造営。{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列格した。 === 祭事 === * 例祭（もろこ祭） - 9月13日 * {{jalink|オコナイ|Q11291908}} - 2月8日 === 境内社 === * 神明社 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|September 13|Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{jalink|Ika District|Q1042353}}, {{jalink|Ōmi Province|Q843882}}, listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{jalink|Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)||shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{jalink|Azai clan|Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{jalink|Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{jalink|1797|Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} ({{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{jalink|Okonai|Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|September 13|Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{jalink|Ika District|Q1042353}}, {{jalink|Ōmi Province|Q843882}}, listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{jalink|Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)||shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{jalink|Azai clan|Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{jalink|Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{jalink|1797|Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} ({{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{jalink|Okonai|Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|September 13|Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{jalink|Ika District|Q1042353}}, {{jalink|Ōmi Province|Q843882}}, listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{jalink|Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)||shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{jalink|Azai clan|Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{jalink|Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{jalink|1797|Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} ({{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{jalink|Okonai|Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|September 13|Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{jalink|Ika District|Q1042353}}, {{jalink|Ōmi Province|Q843882}}, listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{jalink|Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)||shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{jalink|Azai clan|Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{jalink|Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{jalink|1797|Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} ({{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{jalink|Okonai|Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{jalink|Azai clan|Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{jalink|Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{jalink|1797|Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} ({{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{jalink|Okonai|Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|September 13|Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{jalink|Ika District|Q1042353}}, {{jalink|Ōmi Province|Q843882}}, listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{jalink|Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)||shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{jalink|Azai clan|Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{jalink|Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{jalink|1797|Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} ({{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{jalink|Okonai|Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|September 13|Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{jalink|Ika District|Q1042353}}, {{jalink|Ōmi Province|Q843882}}, listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{jalink|Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)||shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{jalink|Azai clan|Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{jalink|Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{jalink|1797|Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} ({{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{jalink|Okonai|Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

{{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|September 13|Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{jalink|Ika District|Q1042353}}, {{jalink|Ōmi Province|Q843882}}, listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{jalink|Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)||shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{jalink|Azai clan|Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{jalink|Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{jalink|1797|Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} ({{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{jalink|Okonai|Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|September 13|Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Homudawake|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{jalink|Ika District|Q1042353}}, {{jalink|Ōmi Province|Q843882}}, listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{jalink|Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)||shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{jalink|Azai clan|Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{jalink|Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{jalink|1797|Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} ({{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{jalink|Okonai|Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill||lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)||WD=|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)||WD=|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)||WD=|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)|UNKNOWN|WD=|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005004576 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Nokitano Shrine|lt=Nokitano Shrine|WD=Q135039854}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)|UNKNOWN|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)|UNKNOWN|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848|1=September 13}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353|1=Ika District, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)|UNKNOWN|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031|1=Azai clan}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562|1=Battle of Shizugatake}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820|1=1797}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908|1=Okonai}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848|1=September 13}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353|1=Ika District, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)|UNKNOWN|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031|1=Azai clan}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562|1=Battle of Shizugatake}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820|1=1797}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908|1=Okonai}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848|1=September 13}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353|1=Ika District, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)|UNKNOWN|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031|1=Azai clan}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562|1=Battle of Shizugatake}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820|1=1797}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908|1=Okonai}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:のきたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848|1=September 13}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353|1=Ika District, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)|UNKNOWN|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031|1=Azai clan}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562|1=Battle of Shizugatake}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820|1=1797}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908|1=Okonai}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]]
