{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848|1=September 13}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353|1=Ika District, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)|UNKNOWN|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031|1=Azai clan}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562|1=Battle of Shizugatake}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820|1=1797}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908|1=Okonai}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848|1=September 13}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353|1=Ika District, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)|UNKNOWN|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031|1=Azai clan}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562|1=Battle of Shizugatake}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820|1=1797}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908|1=Okonai}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848|1=September 13}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353|1=Ika District, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)|UNKNOWN|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031|1=Azai clan}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562|1=Battle of Shizugatake}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820|1=1797}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908|1=Okonai}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848|1=September 13}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353|1=Ika District, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)|UNKNOWN|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031|1=Azai clan}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562|1=Battle of Shizugatake}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820|1=1797}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908|1=Okonai}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8160005004576 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Nokitano Shrine|lt=Nokitano Shrine|WD=Q135039854|1=Nokitano Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町東阿閉1094', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:乃伎多神社 (長浜市高月町東阿閉)]] {{wikidata link|Q11368810}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:46 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Nogita Shrine |画像=[[File:Nogita shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Takatsuki-chō Higashi-Ahe 1094 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|27|27.9|N|136|13|03.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=September 13|Q2848|WD=Q2848|1=September 13}} (Moroko Festival) |神事 = Okonai (February 8) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Nogita Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Nogita Shrine''' (のぎたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Higashi-Ahe, Takatsuki-chō, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Homudawake|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-tsukuri-hime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Left triple tomoe === History === Founding period unknown. It is a candidate shrine (Shikinaisha ronsha) for "Nogita Shrine" in {{ill|lt=Ika District|Q1042353|WD=Q1042353|1=Ika District, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmi Province|Q843882|WD=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}}, listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}Other candidates include a {{ill|lt=Nogita Shrine (Nagahama, Takatsuki-chō Higashimononobe)|UNKNOWN|lt=shrine of the same name}} in Higashimononobe, Takatsuki-chō, same city.. It was under the protection of Ahe Awaji-no-kami, a vassal of the {{ill|lt=Azai clan|Q1872031|WD=Q1872031|1=Azai clan}}, but was lost to fire in the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|WD=Q225562|1=Battle of Shizugatake}}. The current shrine buildings were built in {{ill|lt=1797|Q7820|WD=Q7820|1=1797}} (Kansei 9). In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Moroko Festival) - September 13 * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|WD=Q11291908|1=Okonai}} - February 8 === Precinct shrine === * Shinmei-sha === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1221 乃伎多神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Nogita Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]
